title: All hardcoded stream names are test-only
evidence: Grep for 'stream:xxx' patterns shows only test file references (e.g., tests/integration/pipeline/*.ts, tests/e2e/*.ts). Production code uses RedisStreamsClient.STREAMS constants.
expected: No hardcoded stream names in production code
actual: Confirmed: all hardcoded stream names are in test files only
recommendation: No action needed. Verified by team lead.

title: Consumer group names match expected registry
evidence: coordinator-group (services/coordinator/src/coordinator.ts:396), execution-engine-group (services/execution-engine/src/consumers/opportunity.consumer.ts:174, fast-lane.consumer.ts:102), cross-chain-detector-group (services/cross-chain-detector/src/detector.ts:333,346,353), mempool-detector-group (shared/config/src/mempool-config.ts:77), orderflow-pipeline (shared/core/src/analytics/orderflow-pipeline-consumer.ts:85), failover-* dynamic (shared/core/src/monitoring/cross-region-health.ts:750)
expected: coordinator-group, cross-chain-detector-group, execution-engine-group, mempool-detector-group, orderflow-pipeline, failover-* (dynamic)
actual: All 6 expected consumer group names found in production code. No unexpected groups.

title: DLQ xadd uses xaddWithLimit (signed + MAXLEN)
evidence: shared/core/src/redis/streams.ts:923 — DLQ path uses this.xaddWithLimit(RedisStreamsClient.STREAMS.DEAD_LETTER_QUEUE, ...) which applies STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS registry or DEFAULT_STREAM_MAX_LENGTH=5000
expected: All xadd calls either use xaddWithLimit or pass maxLen option
actual: DLQ path correctly uses xaddWithLimit. No raw this.xadd() calls without MAXLEN in changed files.

title: StreamConsumer handles ACK after consume
evidence: shared/core/src/redis/stream-consumer.ts handles message ACK via onMessage callback pattern. HMAC-rejected messages are also ACKed (streams.ts:908). No changed files consume from groups without ACK.
expected: All consumer group reads have corresponding ACKs
actual: Confirmed: ACK is handled by StreamConsumer infrastructure and HMAC rejection path.

title: 7 minor env vars used in code but not in .env.example
evidence: Undocumented vars: DEBUG_TESTS (test-only), FEE_MULTIPLIER (env-parsing example), GIT_SHA (build metadata), OCI_RESOURCE_PRINCIPAL_VERSION (OCI SDK), RAILWAY_ENVIRONMENT (platform detection), SUCCESS_RATE (env-parsing example), TTL_MS (env-parsing example)
actual: 7 undocumented vars found. All are either test-only (DEBUG_TESTS), platform auto-set (RAILWAY_ENVIRONMENT, OCI_RESOURCE_PRINCIPAL_VERSION, GIT_SHA), or used in JSDoc examples only (FEE_MULTIPLIER, SUCCESS_RATE, TTL_MS).
recommendation: No action needed for this batch. These are non-user-configurable or documentation-only references.

title: HMAC signing infrastructure verified
evidence: STREAM_SIGNING_KEY documented at .env.example:616 (commented). STREAM_SIGNING_KEY_PREVIOUS documented at .env.example:620 (commented). streams.ts:460 enforces signing in production. streams.ts:570-574 implements signMessage with HMAC-SHA256. streams.ts:597-598 verifies with current+previous key rotation. Production factory at streams.ts:1621-1635 reads both env vars.
expected: HMAC signing key documented and enforced in production
actual: Both keys documented, production enforcement present, key rotation supported via previous key.

title: All FEATURE_* flags documented in .env.example
evidence: 22 feature flags in feature-flags.ts. Cross-referenced with .env.example: all FEATURE_BATCHED_QUOTER, FEATURE_FLASH_LOAN_AGGREGATOR, FEATURE_COMMIT_REVEAL, FEATURE_COMMIT_REVEAL_REDIS, FEATURE_DEST_CHAIN_FLASH_LOAN, FEATURE_MOMENTUM_TRACKING, FEATURE_ML_SIGNAL_SCORING, FEATURE_SIGNAL_CACHE_READ, FEATURE_LIQUIDITY_DEPTH_SIZING, FEATURE_DYNAMIC_L1_FEES, FEATURE_ORDERFLOW_PIPELINE, FEATURE_KMS_SIGNING, FEATURE_BACKRUN_STRATEGY, FEATURE_UNISWAPX_FILLER, FEATURE_MEV_SHARE_BACKRUN, FEATURE_FAST_LANE, FEATURE_SOLANA_EXECUTION, FEATURE_STATISTICAL_ARB, FEATURE_MEV_SHARE, FEATURE_ADAPTIVE_RISK_SCORING, FEATURE_TIMEBOOST, FEATURE_FLASHBOTS_PROTECT_L2, FEATURE_COW_BACKRUN are all present in .env.example (active or commented).
actual: All 22 feature flags are documented in .env.example

title: All RISK_* env vars documented in .env.example
evidence: risk-config.ts defines: RISK_MANAGEMENT_ENABLED, DRAWDOWN_BREAKER_ENABLED, RISK_MAX_DAILY_LOSS, RISK_CAUTION_THRESHOLD, RISK_MAX_CONSECUTIVE_LOSSES, RISK_RECOVERY_MULTIPLIER, RISK_RECOVERY_WINS_REQUIRED, RISK_HALT_COOLDOWN_MS, RISK_CAUTION_MULTIPLIER, EV_CALCULATOR_ENABLED, RISK_MIN_EV_THRESHOLD, RISK_MIN_WIN_PROBABILITY, RISK_MAX_LOSS_PER_TRADE, RISK_USE_HISTORICAL_GAS, RISK_DEFAULT_GAS_COST, RISK_DEFAULT_PROFIT_ESTIMATE, POSITION_SIZING_ENABLED, RISK_KELLY_MULTIPLIER, RISK_MAX_SINGLE_TRADE, RISK_MIN_TRADE_FRACTION, RISK_MIN_SAMPLES, RISK_DEFAULT_WIN_PROBABILITY, RISK_MAX_OUTCOMES_PER_KEY, RISK_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_MS, RISK_OUTCOME_RELEVANCE_MS, RISK_PERSIST_TO_REDIS, RISK_REDIS_KEY_PREFIX, RISK_TOTAL_CAPITAL. All found in .env.example.
actual: All 28 RISK_* env vars are documented in .env.example

title: All parseInt/parseFloat in changed files have NaN guards
evidence: Team lead verified: all remaining parseInt/parseFloat in the 19 changed code files use safeParseInt, safeParseFloat, parseEnvFloat, parseEnvInt, or have explicit Number.isNaN guards.
actual: Confirmed by team lead. All parse calls are safe.

title: Redis client and streams client have matching connection config
evidence: client.ts: retryStrategy=capped-exponential(200ms base, 60s cap, never null), maxRetriesPerRequest=3, lazyConnect=true, connectTimeout=3000, reconnectOnError=READONLY. streams.ts: retryStrategy=capped-exponential(200ms base, 60s cap, never null), maxRetriesPerRequest=3, lazyConnect=true, connectTimeout=3000, reconnectOnError=READONLY.
expected: Matching retry/connect config between client.ts and streams.ts
actual: Full parity confirmed on all 5 parameters.

title: Service ports are unique with no collisions
evidence: service-ports.json: coordinator=3000, asia-fast=3001, l2-turbo=3002, high-value=3003, solana=3004, execution-engine=3005, cross-chain=3006, unified-detector=3007, mempool=3008, coordinator-worker=3009, monolith=3100. Fly.io toml files: coordinator=3000, execution-engine=8080(overridden), asia-fast=3001, l2-turbo=3002, high-value=3003, solana=3004, cross-chain=3006. Docker partition uses internal 3001 for all containers (separate namespaces).
actual: No collisions. Execution engine uses 8080 in Fly.io (overridden via HEALTH_CHECK_PORT env). Docker containers use isolated namespaces.

title: No empty catch blocks in changed files
evidence: Searched all 19 changed source files for empty catch blocks (catch { } or catch(e) { }). No matches found. Production files do use bare catch {} but with intentional patterns (cleanup, best-effort operations).
expected: No empty catch blocks in changed files
actual: No empty catch blocks found in any of the 19 changed files.

title: Stream serialization files not changed - check skipped
evidence: No stream serialization files (stream-serialization.ts, types/src/index.ts) were in the 19 changed files list.
actual: Check skipped per instructions.

title: Redis key prefixes are distinct with no collisions
evidence: Key prefix inventory from production code: 'health:' (service health), 'lock:' (distributed locks), 'pair:' (pair data), 'price:' (price cache), 'risk:probabilities:' (risk persistence), 'adaptive:sandwich_attacks' (adaptive risk), 'adaptive:threshold_adjustments' (adaptive risk), 'metrics:recent' (metrics), 'bridge:recovery:' (bridge recovery). Stream names: stream:opportunities, stream:execution-requests, stream:execution-results, stream:price-updates, stream:dlq, stream:fast-lane, stream:health, stream:pending-opportunities.
actual: All prefixes are distinct and semantically separated. No collisions detected.

title: No spread operators in loops in price-matrix.ts
evidence: Grep for spread patterns in loops (... within for/while) in shared/core/src/caching/price-matrix.ts returned no matches.
expected: No spread operators in hot-path loops per ADR-022
actual: No spread-in-loop patterns found.

title: Cross-chain detector maxPriceAgeMs set to 5min, ADR-033 specifies 30s default
evidence: services/cross-chain-detector/src/detector.ts:604 sets maxPriceAgeMs: 5 * 60 * 1000 (300,000ms = 5 minutes). ADR-033-stale-price-window.md specifies default 30,000ms (30 seconds). The fallback at detector.ts:1486 uses ?? 30000 (ADR-033 compliant), but this fallback is never reached because the config explicitly sets 300000.
actual: maxPriceAgeMs = 300000 (5 minutes) — 10x higher than ADR-033 specification
recommendation: Review whether the 5-minute window is intentional for cross-chain (where bridge delays justify wider windows) or if it should align with ADR-033's 30s. If intentional, document the deviation in ADR-033 or the detector config.

title: No direct localhost service-to-service HTTP calls
evidence: Grep for localhost:300X in services/*/src/**/*.ts found only: services/coordinator/src/api/middleware/index.ts:86 which is CORS origin whitelist for development (not service-to-service calls). All inter-service communication uses Redis Streams per ADR-002.
expected: No direct http://localhost:300X calls between services
actual: Only CORS whitelist in middleware (not inter-service). Compliant with ADR-002.

title: Circuit breaker default threshold = 5 per ADR-018
evidence: shared/core/src/resilience/circuit-breaker.ts:408 defaults failureThreshold to 5. shared/core/src/resilience/self-healing-manager.ts:36 uses SYSTEM_CONSTANTS?.circuitBreaker?.defaultFailureThreshold ?? 5. shared/flash-loan-aggregation/src/infrastructure/onchain-liquidity.validator.ts:114 defaults circuitBreakerThreshold to 5.
actual: Confirmed: default threshold is 5 across all implementations.

title: SharedArrayBuffer used in price-matrix.ts
evidence: shared/core/src/caching/price-matrix.ts uses SharedArrayBuffer extensively (lines 224, 291, 314-334, 437-454, 1006-1028). Fallback to ArrayBuffer when SAB unavailable (line 454).
actual: SharedArrayBuffer is the primary storage mechanism with proper fallback.

title: Fly.io toml ports and health paths match service-ports.json
evidence: coordinator.toml: port=3000, path=/api/health. execution-engine.toml: port=8080 (overridden), path=/health. partition-asia-fast.toml: port=3001, path=/health. partition-l2-turbo.toml: port=3002, path=/health. partition-high-value.toml: port=3003, path=/health. partition-solana.toml: port=3004, path=/health. cross-chain-detector.toml: port=3006, path=/health. All match service-ports.json entries (execution-engine override documented in JSON $comment).
actual: All ports and health paths are consistent. Coordinator uses /api/health (Express prefix), all others use /health.

title: Docker compose configs consistent with service-ports.json
evidence: docker-compose.yml: coordinator=3000(/api/health), unified-detector=3001(/health), cross-chain=3006(/health), execution-engine=3005(/health). docker-compose.testnet.yml: same ports, coordinator uses /api/health. docker-compose.partition.yml: all containers use internal 3001 (isolated namespaces), coordinator=3000(/api/health). All health paths correct.
actual: All ports and health paths are consistent across all 3 compose files.

title: Timeout hierarchy is consistent (shutdown > redis-connect)
evidence: SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT_MS = 8000ms (shared/core/src/partition/health-server.ts:465). Redis connectTimeout = 3000ms (client.ts:240, streams.ts:493). Hierarchy: 8000 > 3000. Comment at health-server.ts:461 references old 5000ms connectTimeout but hierarchy is still valid.
actual: 8000ms > 3000ms. Hierarchy is valid. Stale comment references old 5000ms value.
recommendation: Update the comment at health-server.ts:461 from 'Redis connectTimeout (5000ms)' to 'Redis connectTimeout (3000ms)' to match the current value. Low priority.

title: Stale comment in health-server.ts references old connectTimeout value
evidence: shared/core/src/partition/health-server.ts:461 says 'Must exceed Redis connectTimeout (5000ms)' but connectTimeout was changed to 3000ms in a prior fix (SA-008). The actual timeout hierarchy (8000 > 3000) is correct; only the comment is stale.
actual: Comment says 5000ms, actual is 3000ms
recommendation: Update comment to reference 3000ms. Cosmetic fix only — no behavioral impact.
